stimulus: In 1935, French engineer Édouard Bélin demonstrated an early facsimile machine that transmitted images over telephone lines. Two decades later, Bélin ______blank his earlier work to develop one of the first portable photo-transmission devices.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. A main clause requires a finite (tensed) verb. The finite past tense verb “built upon” correctly expresses what Bélin did and matches the past time frame of the passage.

Choices A, B, and D are all nonfinite forms (perfect infinitive, present participle, to-infinitive) that cannot serve as the main verb of a clause.
